pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 36 and export_result.sh - Django User.objects.get(username='admin')
Standard Django admin login URL pattern (setup_task.sh line 65 uses /admin/ which redirects to /admin/login/)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves changing the admin user password in an Aerobridge Django application. The target username is 'admin' (the default Django superuser account). The old password 'adminpass123' is set by the setup_task.sh script as the initial state. The new password must be changed to 'SecureDrone2024!' via the Django admin interface. The login URL is http://localhost:8000/admin/login/ (standard Django admin). The password change form is accessible at /admin/auth/user/<id>/password/ where <id> is a numeric user ID (standard Django admin pattern). All credentials and URLs have been verified against the task implementation scripts and standard Django admin URL patterns.
